facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 4,860 reviews. And somehow Ong Lang beach still flies under the radar.

Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phú Quốc sits right on one of the quietest stretches of coastline on the island. Two restaurants, a full spa, and a pool that actually gets sun all afternoon.

Skip the crowded south. This is where the better version of Phu Quoc lives.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Ong Lang beach at sunrise, resort completely to yourself. This is Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phú Quốc, 4.7 stars across 4,860 reviews, and most tourists drive straight past it heading south. Big mistake.
